home.heroTitle: Identify Southeast Asian Banknotes with Multi-Agent Analysis
home.heroSubtitle: Upload a banknote image and compare results from visual recognition, language reasoning, and visual search before generating a structured result.
home.howSub: Four clear steps from image upload to a structured, consensus-based result.

steps.title: Upload banknote image
steps.desc: Drag and drop or select a photo of any Southeast Asian banknote.

steps.title: Agents analyze independently
steps.desc: ML/DL model, LLM API, and Visual Search each produce their own result in parallel.

steps.title: Aggregator compares results
steps.desc: Majority voting determines the final answer; conflicts are flagged for review.

steps.title: Review result and export JSON
steps.desc: View denomination, country, material, consensus status, and download structured data.

home.agentsSub: Each agent operates independently. The aggregator decides the final result.

agents.label: Agent 1
agents.name: ML / DL Model
agents.desc: Detects visual patterns, denomination clues, and cropped banknote regions.

agents.label: Agent 2
agents.name: LLM API
agents.desc: Reads visible text and reasons over country, currency, material, and description.

agents.label: Agent 3
agents.name: Visual Search
agents.desc: Compares the uploaded image with external visual references when available.

agents.label: Aggregator
agents.name: Majority Voting
agents.desc: Applies majority voting and marks conflicts when results do not agree.

home.resultSub: The final result includes denomination, origin, material, consensus status, and a structured JSON export.
home.featSub: Tools built around the recognition workflow.
home.seaSub: Optimised for the currencies most commonly encountered across the region.
home.ctaSub: Upload an image and get a structured result in seconds — no setup required.
